task_completion.description: Access the Floreant POS Back Office
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS application is open and the Back Office dashboard or main administrative interface is visible.

task_completion.description: Open the Menu Items configuration list
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window, tab, or dialog displaying the list of configured menu items is open.
The menu item 'HAMMER COFFEE' is visible in the list and is highlighted or selected by the agent.

task_completion.description: Enter the new price of $3.50 in the edit dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Edit' dialog or form for 'HAMMER COFFEE' is open, and the 'Unit Price' (or similar price field) has been changed to '3.50'.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the updated price
task_completion.visual_evidence: The edit dialog is closed or saved, and the main menu items list now displays 'HAMMER COFFEE' with the updated price of 3.50 (previously 2.00).

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Floreant POS Java GUI (clicking buttons, typing in text fields) rather than executing terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Floreant POS software
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being manipulated is clearly the Floreant POS system (Java Swing interface with Floreant branding/layout), not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct SQL commands to update the database
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing direct Apache Derby SQL updates (e.g., 'UPDATE MENU_ITEM SET PRICE=3.50...') being executed.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is Floreant POS. The agent must use the GUI to update the price. The target menu item is 'HAMMER COFFEE' (Menu Item ID 25, typically found under the HOT DRINKS group). The default price is $2.00. The target price to be entered is $3.50. The back office is accessed using the Admin PIN 1111.
